CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( fxRecordTypeName__c ="PKI SPI Sales Process" , DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2021,10,18) , CONTAINS(Owner.fxUserAttributes__c,"1000-LDR") , IsConvertedfromLead__c =True )
, IF(TEXT(Solution_Area_of_Interest__c)="","•SAI;","") & IF(TEXT(Type)="","•Type;","") & IF(ISBLANK(Product_Line_Name__c),"•Product Line Name;","")
, ""
) /* Note: What & Why for Description (Long text Field) are handled in P.FLOW_2000*/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage0
